headline: Halliburton’s Greenland Contract Adds Arctic Potential To Undervalued Stock Story
summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) has secured a contract with Greenland Energy Company for the first onshore oil exploration in Greenland's Jameson Land Basin. The agreement gives Halliburton a role in opening a previously undrilled frontier basin in the Arctic region. The project highlights Halliburton's technical capabilities in challenging conditions and expands its international footprint. For investors watching NYSE:HAL, this new Greenland contract comes with the stock trading at $39.12...
